extension.description: Connect to a running Browser instance via CDP for variable watching, JS scratchpad execution, and log streaming.
command.connect.title: Jupyter Browser Kernel: Connect via CDP
command.disconnect.title: Jupyter Browser Kernel: Disconnect
command.reconnect.title: Jupyter Browser Kernel: Reconnect
command.toggleCellIsolation.title: Jupyter Browser Kernel: Toggle Cell Isolation
command.toggleCellIsolation.share.label: Share Cell State
debugger.jupyterBrowserKernel.label: Jupyter Browser Kernel
debugger.jupyterBrowserKernel.snippet.la: Jupyter Browser Kernel: Browser Kernel Debug
debugger.jupyterBrowserKernel.snippet.de: Launch a Browser Kernel debug session against the active connected browser target.
configuration.title: Jupyter Browser Kernel
configuration.cdpHost.description: CDP endpoint host name or IP address.
configuration.cdpHost.markdownDescriptio: Host for the Browser CDP endpoint. Use a resolvable hostname or IP address, for example `localhost` or `127.0.0.1`.
configuration.cdpPort.markdownDescriptio: TCP port for the Browser CDP endpoint. Set a whole number from `1` to `65535`.
configuration.watchAutoRefreshInterval.d: Auto-refresh interval in ms for the variable watcher. 0 = disabled.
